query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
       p.id as profile_id, p.territories, p.assignedBusinessLines, p.sectorFocus, p.onboardingCompleted
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN userProfiles p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Lee%' OR u.name LIKE '%Ryan%' OR u.email LIKE '%lee%' OR u.email LIKE '%ryan%' OR u.email LIKE '%pemberton%' OR u.email LIKE '%allen%'
ORDER BY u.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
       p.id as profile_id, p.territories, p.assignedBusinessLines, p.sectorFocus, p.onboardingCompleted
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN userProfiles p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Lee%' OR u.name LIKE '%Ryan%' OR u.email LIKE '%lee%' OR u.email LIKE '%ryan%' OR u.email LIKE '%pemberton%' OR u.email LIKE '%allen%'
ORDER BY u.name;
